---
id: build-certificate-delete
title: "Delete a build certificate"
description: "Delete an app's build certificate. You can fetch the build certificate slug for this endpoint if you first call the [GET /apps/{app-slug}/build-certificates](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/build-certificate/build-certificate-list) endpoint to list all available build certificates of an app. Read more in our [Deleting an iOS code signing file](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#deleting-an-ios-code-signing-file) guide."
sidebar_label: "Delete a build certificate"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a build certificate"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/build-certificates/{build-certificate-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete an app's build certificate. You can fetch the build certificate slug for this endpoint if you first call the [GET /apps/\{app-slug\}/build-certificates](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/build-certificate/build-certificate-list) endpoint to list all available build certificates of an app. Read more in our [Deleting an iOS code signing file](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#deleting-an-ios-code-signing-file) guide.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
